title: YMTC's third Wuhan fab clears Beijing's 50% local tooling threshold as two more are planned — move positions company toward 3D NAND production to capitalize on wafer bonding strengths
snippet: China’s YMTC is expected to start operations at its Phase 3 Wuhan fab late this year as the first leading-edge memory plant built to comply with Beijing's unwritten 50% tooling requirement.
contentText: China’s YMTC is expected to start operations at its Phase 3 Wuhan fab late this year as the first leading-edge memory plant built to comply with Beijing's unwritten 50% tooling requirement.

title: Not all networks can handle AI traffic – and experts are sounding alarms
snippet: Y'all been focusing on compute and forgot about how the data moves around AI is reshaping the demands on network infrastructure, and many organizations are not prepared – including some of the so-called neocloud provide…
contentText: Y'all been focusing on compute and forgot about how the data moves around AI is reshaping the demands on network infrastructure, and many organizations are not prepared – including some of the so-called neocloud providers offering AI services.…

title: Valve might be adding a 30-day price tracker to Steam — feature is already available in some EU countries to spoof out fake discounts
snippet: Your Steam games are about to get some new glanceable information next to their price boxes, according to recent changes discovered in the client's backend. Valve might be adding a 30-day price tracker to the platform,…
contentText: Your Steam games are about to get some new glanceable information next to their price boxes, according to recent changes discovered in the client's backend. Valve might be adding a 30-day price tracker to the platform, letting you see if the game currently costs the lowest it has been in the last month.

snippet: First phase will go live in August
contentText: First phase will go live in August

title: Memory cards and flash drives prices rocket 124%, some products peak at 261% jump — increases from 2025 driven by AI chip shortage across a range of formats and capacities
snippet: USB flash drives, SD cards, and microSD cards are becoming expensive as the NAND chip shortage takes its bite and expands to other storage options.
contentText: USB flash drives, SD cards, and microSD cards are becoming expensive as the NAND chip shortage takes its bite and expands to other storage options.

title: Andreessen, Horowitz Boost AI Super PAC Cash to Over $50 Million

title: HPE Fights Tycoon Mike Lynch’s Widow Over His Estate’s Administrators
snippet: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. asked a UK court to name administrators over the estate of British tech entrepreneur Mike Lynch, who died after his luxury yacht sank off the coast of Sicily in 2024, as the technology fir…
contentText: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. asked a UK court to name administrators over the estate of British tech entrepreneur Mike Lynch, who died after his luxury yacht sank off the coast of Sicily in 2024, as the technology firm seeks to recoup about $1.2 billion.

title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
snippet: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.
contentText: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

title: Citi Upgrades US Stocks to Overweight on AI, Tech
snippet: “AI that was on shaky ground at the start of the year, is back,” says Beata Manthey, head of European equity strategy at Citi, as she explains why her firm has upgraded US stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Allbirds Soars After Sneaker Firm Rebrands as AI Stock

title: Reid Hoffman weighs in on the ‘tokenmaxxing’ debate
snippet: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.
contentText: Reid Hoffman says tracking AI token use can gauge adoption, but cautions it should be paired with context and not treated as a direct productivity metric.

title: Musk Row Shows Gap With Ramaphosa in South Africa Equity Rules
snippet: President Cyril Ramaphosa said billionaire Elon Musk could use equity-equivalence programs to meet South Africa’s racial-equity rules and roll out his Starlink internet service locally, pointing to US firms that comply…
contentText: President Cyril Ramaphosa said billionaire Elon Musk could use equity-equivalence programs to meet South Africa’s racial-equity rules and roll out his Starlink internet service locally, pointing to US firms that comply through alternative investments rather than ownership.

title: Meta Faces Risk of EU Restrictions Over WhatsApp AI Concern
snippet: Meta Platforms Inc. has been threatened with an interim European Union ban on policies that allegedly block rival AI firms from operating on WhatsApp, unless the tech giant offers fixes that appease the bloc’s concerns.
contentText: Meta Platforms Inc. has been threatened with an interim European Union ban on policies that allegedly block rival AI firms from operating on WhatsApp, unless the tech giant offers fixes that appease the bloc’s concerns.

title: CATL Earmarks $4.4 Billion for Critical Minerals Security
